description: cache result identity follows BuildKit ID and resolved-destination value equality

writes.Dockerfile:
FROM base
WORKDIR /work
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=relative-cache,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'mkdir -p /oracle; printf relative >/oracle/relative'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/equal,id=/equal,sharing=shared sh -euxc 'printf explicit >/oracle/explicit'

FROM base
WORKDIR /work
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=relative-cache,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'mkdir -p /oracle; printf relative >/oracle/relative'
RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/equal,id=/different,sharing=locked sh -euxc 'printf explicit >/oracle/explicit'
